name_cn:
🔥🔥🔥【Original Leather with 🌈Full Counter Packaging】🔥🔥
Intro: The Jackie 1961 series reimagines the 'Aria - Fashion Aria' with a soft, structured rectangular tote. Features the iconic gold-tone push-lock and dazzling rhinestones!!️ paired with noble lizard skin🦎. The hollow-out design adds a touch of fashion.
Material!!️ Counter-quality rhinestones and imported lizard skin, precise hardware matching👏. Clear texture, delicate feel, top quality!
Model: 675799. 677027
Size: 19x13x3cm.
Color: Pink/Lizard Skin Rhinestone.
